name: djungle-plugins
description: Plugin marketplace Djungle — agenti AI, skill operative, integrazioni MCP per clienti FNX / Djungle Bridge / Space.

plugins.name: djungle-agent-os
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.3.0: self multi-tenant — N tenant isolati per user, switcher nel portal + skill /tenant. v4.2.x: Librarian — briefing weekly automatico con alert su drift/contraddizioni/duplicazioni (/librarian, /librarian-now, /briefing). v4.1.x: custom agents UI, marketplace, /sota-board dashboard, agent versioning. Self-service portal su agents.djungle.io.
